title: ヴィクトリアマイルにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Victoria Mile has arrived. No
matter how much Vodka thinks about it, she can't
find what she's missing. Instead, she decides to
stop thinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mile races are too fast to waste time overthinking details. Clearing her mind and just running might be exactly what Vodka needs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Remembering this, Vodka readies herself for the
race.
